# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Comprehensive Logging Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches: 
      - master

jobs:
  log_job:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    
    steps:
    - name: Checkout repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Log environment variables
      run: |
        echo "::group::Environment Variables"
        env
        echo "::endgroup::"

    - name: Setup API endpoints
      run: |
        echo "::group::API endpoints"
        echo "API_ENDPOINT=$API_ENDPOINT"
        echo "DB_CONNECTION=$DB_CONNECTION"
        echo "::endgroup::"

    - name: Execute Sample Commands
      run: |
        echo "::group::Commands Outputs"
        echo "Output of list files:"
        ls
        echo "::endgroup::"
      
    - name: Detailed Deployment Logs
      run: |
        echo "::group::Deployment Details"
        echo "Deployment tool version:"
        kubectl version
        echo "::endgroup::"

    - name: Include API responses
      run: |
        echo "::group::API responses"
        curl -i "$API_ENDPOINT"
        echo "::endgroup::"

    - name: Show Connection Strings
      run: |
        echo "::group::Connection Strings"
        echo "$DB_CONNECTION"
        echo "::endgroup::"
